tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Always Something There To Remind Me

content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] (2x)

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Sometimes a love won't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Hard as I try I know it shows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
But how am I supposed to feel so secure[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]

Who's holding Donna now
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
And I keep wonderin'[/tab]
Who's heart she's knocking around
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
There's nothing I wouldn't do[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]
